title: The Civil Hoax: Civil War Deniers
original_title: The Civil Hoax: Civil War Deniers
overview: Historical deniers, conspiracy theorists, and other idiots serve up interviews and meet to discuss their mission to spread rumors, denial, and alternative facts about the U.S. Civil War.
